diagrams.title: Else-If Ladder Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows sequential condition checking in else-if ladder
elements: Multiple diamond shapes for else-if conditions
Each branch either executes or continues to next
Bottom default path for all-false case
diagrams.purpose: Understand how multiple conditions are evaluated sequentially
